[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101100 3
1 0000000 a
2 0001010 2
3 1000110 3
4 0000100 1
5 0101100 3
6 0000111 3
7 0000001 1

01 10 0010110 3
12 21 1000101 3
23 32 0000101 2
34 43 0101101 4
45 54 0001011 3
56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0100110 3
70 07 0111110 5

02 20 0000100 1 match 4
13 31 0000101 2
24 42 0000101 2
35 53 0001001 2
46 64 0100110 3
57 75 0001010 2 match 2
60 06 0100110 3
71 17 0010110 3

03 30 0101100 3 match 0 5
14 41 0000111 3 match 6
25 52 0000001 1 match 7
36 63 0100100 2
47 74 0101110 4
50 05 0001010 2 match 2
61 16 1000110 3 match 3
72 27 0000100 1 match 4

04 40 0101110 4
15 51 0000011 2
26 62 1000100 2
37 73 0101100 3 match 0 5
